div.h1: Thread ID vs Process ID Keying
div.h2: Why Thread ID is Required for Hash Map Keys

g.text: ❌ PROBLEM: Using Process ID as Hash Map Key
✅ SOLUTION: Using Thread ID as Hash Map Key

ul.li: pid = Thread ID (what userspace calls TID)

div.p: Why Process ID fails: Multi-threaded processes share the same PID but execute independently. Two threads entering syscalls simultaneously will race on the same hash map slot.

g.text: Fix: Use TID instead of PID
